case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. KING C CHU

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-20-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, KING C $6,804.49 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,094.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100108060)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-20-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
